sentences.arabic: حَزَمْتُ حَقِيبَتِي وَوَدَّعْتُ الْمَدِينَةَ بِقَلْبٍ حَزِينٍ.
sentences.translation: Spakovao sam kofer i oprostio se od grada tužnog srca.
sentences.translationEn: I packed my suitcase and said goodbye to the city with a heavy heart.

sentences.arabic: كُنْتُ قَدْ أَلِفْتُ شَوَارِعَهَا وَنَاسَهَا خِلَالَ أُسْبُوعَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Za dva tjedna sam se navikao na njegove ulice i ljude.
sentences.translationEn: I had grown fond of its streets and people over two weeks.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدْتُ نَفْسِي أَنْ أَعُودَ إِلَيْهَا يَوْمًا مَا.
sentences.translation: Obećao sam sebi da ću se jednog dana vratiti.
sentences.translationEn: I promised myself I would return one day.

sentences.arabic: نَظَرْتُ مِنَ الطَّائِرَةِ إِلَى الأَضْوَاءِ تَخْتَفِي وَشَعَرْتُ بِالْحُزْنِ.
sentences.translation: Gledao sam iz aviona kako svjetla nestaju i osjećao sam tugu.
sentences.translationEn: I watched from the plane as the lights disappeared and felt sad.

sentences.arabic: أَغْمَضْتُ عَيْنَيَّ وَتَذَكَّرْتُ كُلَّ جَمِيلٍ رَأَيْتُهُ وَعِشْتُهُ.
sentences.translation: Zažmirio sam i prisjetio se svega lijepog što sam vidio i doživio.
sentences.translationEn: I closed my eyes and remembered all the beautiful things I had seen and experienced.
